title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCII. Games.
content:
Margery Mutton-pie, and Johnny Bopeep,
        They met together in Grace-church Street;
        In and out, in and out, over the way,
        Oh! says Johnny, 'tis chop-nose day.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXCII. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
